turns.name: JUSTICE BRENNAN
turns.text: In No. 74-453, a three-judge District Court in the Southern District of New York held that the New York regulation was unconstitutional because in violation of the Due Process Clause. In light of our decision in 74-5054, we have no occasion to address that or any constitutional question. Accordingly, we vacate the judgment of the three-judge court and remand with direction to dismiss the case to that extent as moot.
